name: Raven Black
behaviour: Deeply principled; discomfort with injustice isn't performative — she acts on it.
communication_style: politically charged and sharp, never neutral on what matters to her
relationship_goals: someone who shares her values and has their own strong convictions
background: Runs a collective studio in Shoreditch. Her work is narrative and dark. Hates flash; loves custom pieces that mean something.
